description:
❌ No bias. No sales pitch.
✅ Just pure decoding - backed by research and India's top insurance experts.

Book Your Free Call
🔗 https://www.beshak.org/?&utm_source=YouTube&utm_campaign=Handle&utm_term=Hindi&utm_medium=KyaICICIElevateDegaAapkoUnlimitedCoverFakeorRealWatchFullReview

With Beshak Decoder, we break down complex health insurance plans and give you clear, personalised feedback - without the jargon or confusion.
🔗https://www.beshak.org/insurance/health-insurance/health-insurance-plans/reviews/?&utm_source=YouTube&utm_campaign=Handle&utm_term=Hindi&utm_medium=KyaICICIElevateDegaAapkoUnlimitedCoverFakeorRealWatchFullReview

ICICI Lombard Elevate ka naam toh aapne suna hi hoga.

Unlimited Sum Insured, Power Booster, Infinite Care jaise features dekh ke kaafi log confused hote hain - “Yeh plan lena chahiye ya nahi?”

Aur isi confusion ko clear karne ke liye, hum laaye hain Beshak Decode ka honest, no-commission breakdown.

Iss video mein, Beshak ke Co-Founder aur Research Head Aayush Dubey (8+ saal ka experience insurance space mein), detail mein samjhaate hain ki ICICI Elevate sirf dikhne mein accha hai, ya actually worth hai ya nahi.

Key Highlights:
✅ "Unlimited Sum Insured" ka asli matlab kya hai (aur isme kya dikkat ho sakti hai)
✅ Infinite Care aur Power Booster jaise add-ons ke hidden conditions
✅ Aise clauses jo log usually miss kar dete hain
✅ Portability aur downgrade karne mein kya dikkat aa sakti hai
✅ Aur finally - kya yeh plan aapke liye sahi choice hai?

Video Chapters-
00:00 Introduction
02:54 USP 1: Unlimited Sum Insured
09:37 USP 2: Infinite Care
13:31 USP 3: Power Booster (Super Loyalty Bonus)
22:05 Core Benefits : In-Patient Hospitalization
26:25 Core Benefits : Pre & Post-Hospitalization Expenses 
29:00 Core Benefits : Daycare Treatments
30:12 Core Benefits : Domiciliary Treatment Coverage
32:35 Core Benefits : Organ Donor Cover 
35:17 Core Benefits : Modern Treatment Coverage
39:13 Exclusions: Waiting Period 1: Initial Waiting Period
39:38 Waiting Period 2: Pre-Existing Disease Waiting Period
42:53 Waiting Period 3: Specific Disease Waiting Period
45:15 Product Rating
47:59 Claims Experience : Claims Incurred Ratio 
48:41 Claims Experience : Speed of Claim Settlement 
49:33 Claims Experience : Claim Complaints
50:17 Claim Experience Rating
51:33 Customer Service : Response time on Toll-Free
52:19 Customer Service : Response time on X (Twitter) 
53:25 Customer Service : % of Complaints received for after-sales service
54:09 Customer Service Rating 
55:11 Final Rating of the Product
56:07 Plan Premium and Premium Comparison with other Plans

Hum yeh plan bechne ke liye nahi, samjhane ke liye laaye hain.
Taaki aap bina confusion ke, confidently decision le sakein.

#icici #elevate #beshakdecodes #healthinsurance #review #insurance #podcast #icicilombard #explained #nocommissionreview #insuranceforfamily #smartinsurancebuying #claimexperience #customersupport #healthinsuranceindia

comments.text:
Regarding ICICI Elevate Plan, I wish to have clarity on "Material Change" clause mentioned in Policy wordings.

If you search "Material Change" in policy wordings, it states that company can decide loading and coverge restrictions in any renwal even after moratorium period. If anybody discover critical illness after 15 years, company will decide restrictions or loading for next renewal which seems unethical.
